remember: Identify and recall different types of user-defined functions such as void, value-returning, recursive and overloaded functions.
Explain the concept of function arguments, parameters, and local variables with examples.
Describe the syntax and usage of function declarations and definitions.
understand: Explain the purpose and benefits of modular programming using functions.
Describe how functions improve code readability, reusability, and maintainability.
Understand the concept of function scope, lifetime, and access specifiers.
apply: Write and implement simple user-defined functions in a programming language.
Use functions to solve real-world problems and demonstrate their application in different scenarios.
Optimize function code for efficiency, readability, and maintainability.
analyze: Analyze the efficiency and performance of different function implementations.
Compare and contrast various function types and their applications.
Evaluate the effectiveness of functions in improving code quality and reducing complexity.

ncert_objectives: Understand the concept of functions, their types, and their applications in programming.
board_exam_objectives: Identify and explain the different types of functions and their characteristics.
Use functions to solve problems and demonstrate their application in programming.
